creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
Birthday dinner at @thepodsdubai - this has been on our Dubai list forever, and it did not disappoint! ✨

Private glass pod, skyline views, balloons, candles, sparkulars outside, and even a red carpet welcome.🥂

If you’re looking for a unique way to celebrate, this is definitely the spot to add to your list. 🥳

#dubai #dubailife #dubaitravel #birthdayindubai #visitdubai #uaetravel #dubairestaurants #dubaitips #exploredubai #luxurydubai

transcription.text: I'm not gonna stop breaking my heart I don't wanna be another one
